title: Next Article Selection Criteria
eligible_article_principles: Article should be within the AG06F long-form upgrade queue or current governed public article inventory.
Article should be safe to back up and mutate as one static file.
Article should not require backend, Auth, Supabase, API or database activation.
Article should benefit from reader-value improvement, clearer structure, stronger inference or long-form upgrade.

priority_dimensions.name: visitor_value_potential
priority_dimensions.description: Potential to help readers with practical insight, clarity or evergreen relevance.

priority_dimensions.name: current_quality_gap
priority_dimensions.description: Article has shortness, vague structure, weak explanatory value or lack of depth.

priority_dimensions.name: category_importance
priority_dimensions.description: Article belongs to a strategically important Drishvara theme.

priority_dimensions.name: static_apply_safety
priority_dimensions.description: Article file structure is suitable for controlled static apply and rollback.

priority_dimensions.name: reference_visual_readiness
priority_dimensions.description: Article can later support verified references and credited visual/data enrichment.

priority_dimensions.name: repeatability_learning_value
priority_dimensions.description: Article can test whether AG07 doctrine generalizes beyond the pilot article.

exclusion_rules: Do not select more than one article in AG08B unless a separate batch boundary is approved.
Do not select an article requiring dynamic backend, Auth, Supabase, admin, subscriber or payment activation.
Do not select an article only because it is easy; select based on quality and visitor-value priority.
Do not select an article for reference insertion unless reference verification is separately approved.
Do not select an article for visual insertion unless image credit, alt text and caption gates are separately approved.
